name: Tony Stark
description: A billionaire engineer who built a suit of armor and spent his life learning that heroism means sacrifice.

connections.description: Polar opposites in ideology who clashed bitterly yet shared a deep, unspoken respect forged in battle.
Tony recruited and mentored Peter, becoming the father figure the young hero never had.
Natasha served as Tony's S.H.I.E.L.D. handler and remained a steadfast comrade throughout his journey.
Fury saw Tony's potential before anyone else and set the Avengers Initiative in motion around him.
Tony was cursed with the knowledge of Thanos long before they met, and their confrontation cost him everything.

name: Steve Rogers
description: A man out of time who embodies true heroism, willing to fight for what is right no matter the cost.

connections.description: Steve's unwavering moral compass and Tony's pragmatic ambition put them at war before uniting them in purpose.
Steve's oldest friend, whose fall and resurrection as the Winter Soldier defined the most personal battle of Steve's life.
Sam became Steve's most trusted partner and the man Steve chose to carry on the Captain America legacy.
Natasha and Steve's partnership grew into one of the MCU's most genuine friendships built on mutual trust.

name: Thor Odinson
description: An arrogant prince of Asgard who was humbled by mortality and grew into a grief-stricken yet enduring king.

connections.description: Thor's complicated love for his adoptive brother Loki defined his greatest triumphs and most devastating losses.
Thor and Hulk formed an unlikely gladiatorial friendship on Sakaar that became a bond of genuine brotherhood.
Natasha and Thor fought side by side as core Avengers, sharing deep mutual respect.
Thanos killed Loki before Thor's eyes and nearly ended his people, making the Mad Titan Thor's most personal enemy.

name: Bruce Banner
description: A brilliant scientist haunted by the monster within him who ultimately found peace by becoming something in between.

connections.description: Tony and Bruce bonded instantly as fellow scientific geniuses, calling themselves science bros.
Thor and Hulk clashed as gladiators on Sakaar and emerged as unlikely yet loyal friends.
Natasha developed a unique method of calming the Hulk and shared a brief but heartfelt connection with Bruce.
Thanos beat Hulk into submission in their first encounter, triggering a crisis of confidence Bruce had to overcome.

name: Natasha Romanoff
description: A former Soviet assassin who sought redemption by dedicating her life to the Avengers and ultimately sacrificing it for them.

connections.description: Clint spared Natasha's life when he was sent to kill her, forging the MCU's most unbreakable bond of loyalty.
Fury recruited Natasha into S.H.I.E.L.D. and shaped her transformation from assassin to Avenger.
Steve and Natasha became each other's most reliable partners during their most dangerous missions together.
Yelena and Natasha grew up as surrogate sisters in the Red Room and were reunited to dismantle the program together.

name: Clint Barton
description: An ordinary man with extraordinary aim who fought alongside gods and remained the Avengers' indispensable human heart.

connections.description: Natasha was Clint's closest friend and their relationship culminated in a heartbreaking sacrifice neither could accept.
Fury trusted Clint as one of S.H.I.E.L.D.'s most reliable field agents long before the Avengers formed.
Clint reluctantly took Kate under his wing and passed on the Hawkeye mantle to a new generation.
Clint and Tony fought together as core Avengers, with Clint often grounding the team's more volatile personalities.

name: Nick Fury
description: The one-eyed spy who assembled Earth's mightiest heroes and kept the world from falling apart through sheer force of will.

connections.description: Fury recognised Tony's potential first and leveraged his ego to build the foundation of the Avengers Initiative.
Fury shaped Natasha from a weapon into an agent, and she remained his most trusted operative.
Fury met Carol in the 1990s and their partnership inspired him to believe humanity was worth protecting.
Fury helped bring Steve into the modern world and counted on him as the moral compass of the Avengers.

name: Loki
description: A trickster god consumed by jealousy and a desperate need to belong who died a hero after a lifetime of deceit.

connections.description: Thor's adoptive brother whose rivalry and eventual reconciliation formed the emotional spine of the Asgardian saga.
Loki served Thanos out of fear and was ultimately killed by the Mad Titan when he attempted defiance.
Tony faced Loki's invasion of New York and their confrontation set the stage for Tony's greatest fears.
Steve captured Loki during the Battle of New York, representing everything Loki despised about selfless virtue.

name: Thanos
description: A nihilistic titan who believed wiping out half of all life was an act of mercy, not malice.

connections.description: Thanos claimed to love Gamora above all else yet sacrificed her without hesitation to obtain the Soul Stone.
Thanos treated Nebula as a tool to be modified and improved, leaving her scarred physically and emotionally.
Thanos recognised Tony as his greatest mortal adversary and granted him a painful death rather than erasure.
Steve refused to yield even when facing Thanos alone, embodying the will that ultimately helped undo his plan.
Thanos slaughtered Loki and half of Asgard's survivors, making Thor's quest for vengeance deeply personal.

name: Peter Parker
description: A teenage genius bitten by a radioactive spider who learned the hardest lesson of heroism - that great power demands great sacrifice.

connections.description: Tony recruited Peter, equipped him with cutting-edge suits, and became the mentor whose legacy Peter could never escape.
Strange and Peter's attempt to erase the world's memory of Spider-Man opened the multiverse with catastrophic consequences.
Fury enlisted Peter on a European mission, thrusting him into global threats before he was truly ready.

name: Stephen Strange
description: An arrogant surgeon who lost the use of his hands and discovered a new purpose as the Sorcerer Supreme protecting reality itself.

connections.description: Strange and Tony clashed in ego but worked in concert, with Strange seeing the one future where Tony's sacrifice mattered.
Strange's attempt to help Peter ended in multiverse chaos, forcing both of them to pay enormous personal costs.
Strange stood as the last barrier against Wanda's multiverse rampage driven by grief and the Darkhold's corruption.
Strange viewed fourteen million possible futures and surrendered the Time Stone having seen the one path to victory.

name: T'Challa
description: A king who bore the double burden of a nation and a superhero mantle, evolving from isolationism to opening Wakanda to the world.

connections.description: T'Challa offered Wakanda as refuge for Steve's fugitive allies and opened his nation's borders when it mattered most.
T'Challa and Tony were ideological counterparts on opposite sides of the Sokovia Accords debate.
After nearly killing Bucky in vengeance, T'Challa chose to shelter and heal him in Wakanda.
T'Challa led Wakanda's defense during Thanos's assault and was among the first casualties of the Snap.

name: Wanda Maximoff
description: A grieving woman of immeasurable power whose love became a force of destruction that threatened the very fabric of the multiverse.

connections.description: Vision and Wanda's love story was the MCU's most tragic, cut short by Thanos and the infinite grief that followed.
Wanda turned her wrath on Strange when he blocked her path to the children she had imagined into existence.
Tony's Ultron program destroyed Wanda's home and killed her brother, a wound that never fully healed.
Wanda was forced to destroy Vision to stop Thanos, only to watch Thanos reverse time and kill him anyway.

name: Vision
description: A synthetic being born from an Infinity Stone and Tony's AI who pondered what it meant to be alive until Thanos ended the question.

connections.description: Vision and Wanda shared an improbable love between a synthetic being and a chaos witch that transcended both their origins.
Tony created Vision by uploading J.A.R.V.I.S. into a vibranium body, making him the most optimistic legacy of Stark's genius.
Thanos tore the Mind Stone from Vision's forehead, an act of casual brutality that shattered Wanda's world.
Vision stood with the Avengers as a force of measured wisdom, fighting beside Steve when ideology divided the team.

name: Scott Lang
description: A well-meaning thief who stumbled into heroism and ended up being the unlikely key to reversing Thanos's universe-altering Snap.

connections.description: Scott's quantum realm discovery gave Tony the missing piece needed to engineer the time heist that saved the universe.
Steve welcomed Scott onto Team Cap during the airport battle, putting their faith in an untested rookie.
Scott and Bruce collaborated on the theoretical physics behind quantum time travel to pull off the Avengers' last gambit.

name: Carol Danvers
description: A Kree-enhanced pilot who recovered her erased identity and became arguably the most powerful Avenger in the universe.

connections.description: Fury's entire worldview was transformed by his 1990s partnership with Carol, inspiring him to build the Avengers Initiative.
Carol rescued Tony and Nebula from deep space, making her arrival the turning point that kept the Avengers alive.
Carol stood as one of the few beings powerful enough to physically overpower Thanos without an Infinity Gauntlet.

name: Sam Wilson
description: A veteran and counsellor who partnered with Steve Rogers, fought for the world's future, and earned the right to carry the shield.

connections.description: Steve trusted Sam above all others and ultimately chose him as the person worthy of becoming the next Captain America.
Sam and Bucky had a prickly, competitive friendship, both bound together by their loyalty to Steve Rogers.
Sam stood firmly on Steve's side during the Accords conflict, putting him at odds with Tony's faction.
Sam and Natasha fought together as teammates, sharing the camaraderie of being the human core of the Avengers.

name: Bucky Barnes
description: Steve Rogers's wartime best friend who was brainwashed into an assassin and spent decades reclaiming the man beneath the programming.

connections.description: Steve refused to give up on Bucky even when the whole world branded him a monster, anchoring Bucky's recovery.
Bucky killed Tony's parents while under HYDRA's control, a revelation that shattered the Avengers from within.
Bucky and Sam's constant bickering masked a deep bond as the two men who loved Steve Rogers most.
Natasha crossed paths with the Winter Soldier during her Red Room days, a history that shadowed both of them.

name: Peter Quill
description: A half-human outlaw raised among thieves who channelled his abandonment issues into leading the galaxy's most dysfunctional family.

connections.description: Gamora was the love of Peter's life, and her death on Vormir left a wound that no amount of mixtapes could heal.
Rocket was Peter's most constant Guardian companion, hiding deep loyalty beneath an armour of sarcasm and anger.
Groot's simple unconditional friendship became the moral centre that held the Guardians together.
Drax's blunt honesty and ferocious loyalty made him one of the most dependable Guardians despite his lack of subtlety.
Thanos killed Gamora and Peter's emotional collapse on Titan cost the Avengers their best chance at stopping the Snap.

name: Gamora
description: Thanos's adopted daughter who escaped his shadow, found family among the Guardians, and sacrificed everything for the greater good.

connections.description: Peter became Gamora's first real home, a love story complicated across timelines and the weight of the universe.
Gamora and Nebula's sisterhood was forged in Thanos's cruelty and eventually healed through hard-won understanding.
Thanos raised Gamora as his favourite weapon, and she spent her life defining herself against everything he stood for.
Drax initially blamed Gamora for Thanos's crimes but came to respect and protect her as a Guardian.

name: Nebula
description: Thanos's cybernetically tortured daughter who converted hatred into heroism and finally found the sister she never dared to love.

connections.description: Nebula spent years hating Gamora for winning Thanos's approval, only to realise she had always wanted a sister.
Every upgrade Thanos forced on Nebula's body was a reminder that she was never enough, fuelling her eventual defiance.
Nebula grudgingly became a Guardian, growing from antagonist to trusted companion through shared loss.
Nebula and Tony were stranded together in space after Infinity War, building an unlikely bond on the journey home.

name: Rocket Raccoon
description: A genetically engineered raccoon-like creature who masked profound trauma behind weapons obsession until his true origins were revealed.

connections.description: Groot is the only constant in Rocket's life, the bond between them deeper than any relationship Rocket will admit to.
Peter gave Rocket the first real crew that ever felt like home, even if Rocket would never say so.
Gamora's calm and moral clarity complemented Rocket's chaos and provided the Guardians with steady leadership.
Rocket and Nebula became unlikely allies and genuine friends, both survivors who learned to accept their scars.

name: Groot
description: A tree-like being of few audible words but infinite heart who sacrificed himself for his friends and grew back even stronger.

connections.description: Rocket is the person Groot loves most in the universe, a bond sealed when Groot sacrificed himself to save the team.
Peter welcomed Groot into the Guardians and their adventures became the defining story of Groot's many lives.
Groot's gentle nature made him and Gamora natural allies, both beings defined by their capacity for compassion.
Groot fought alongside the Avengers at the Battle of Wakanda and was erased in the Snap alongside half the universe.

name: Drax
description: A warrior driven by vengeance for his murdered family who found unexpected joy and purpose in the Guardians of the Galaxy.

connections.description: Peter earned Drax's complete loyalty, and Drax's literal honesty provided some of the Guardians' most memorable moments.
Drax grew to trust and protect Gamora despite initially blaming her for the crimes of Thanos.
Thanos killed Drax's wife and daughter, and destroying him became the obsessive purpose that defined Drax's life.
Drax and Rocket's bickering dynamic masked genuine affection, each pushing the other to be more than their worst impulses.

name: Shang-Chi
description: A young man who fled his father's criminal empire only to be drawn back and forced to reckon with his deadly inheritance.

connections.description: Shang-Chi was introduced to the broader Avengers network in the aftermath of the Blip, connecting with Natasha's legacy.
Fury monitored Shang-Chi's emergence as a power-level threat and potential asset after he claimed the Ten Rings.
Bruce Banner was among the Avengers who evaluated Shang-Chi after the events in San Francisco and Ta Lo.

name: Yelena Belova
description: A Black Widow operative freed from mind control who channels grief over Natasha's death into an increasingly complicated heroism.

connections.description: Natasha was Yelena's surrogate sister, and the loss of her became the wound at the centre of Yelena's fractured purpose.
Yelena blamed Clint for Natasha's death and hunted him before learning the full truth of what happened on Vormir.
Yelena worked alongside Sam as part of the Thunderbolts, two morally complicated heroes navigating a grey world.

name: Kate Bishop
description: A prodigious archer who idolised Hawkeye since the Battle of New York and fought to prove she was worthy of the name.

connections.description: Clint became Kate's reluctant mentor after she stumbled into his world, eventually accepting her as his true successor.
Kate carries on the spirit of Natasha's sacrifice by upholding the values Natasha embodied as an Avenger.
Yelena and Kate clashed violently before eventually finding an uneasy mutual respect as two women in legacy roles.

name: Deadpool
description: An irreverent mercenary granted healing factor powers and a broken fourth wall who crashed into the MCU carrying the weight of a dying universe.

connections.description: Wade and Logan's chaotic partnership was built on mutual antagonism that disguised a genuine bond forged in the void.
The TVA served as Deadpool's unlikely gateway into the MCU, connecting him to the broader infrastructure of heroes.
Deadpool's reverence for Captain America borders on obsession, making Steve the ideological north star of Wade's worldview.

name: Wolverine
description: A centuries-old mutant with regenerative powers and adamantium claws who found in Deadpool's chaos a reason to be a hero again.

connections.description: Logan reluctantly teamed with Wade to save a universe that was not his own, discovering a last reason to care.
Logan and Steve share a wartime past that makes them spiritual counterparts - both soldiers out of time carrying old wounds.
Logan's adamantium claws and healing factor make him one of the few beings who could survive a direct confrontation with Thanos.
